ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of departure */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual time of departure */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, cancelled, diverted) */,
  "reason_for_delay" TEXT /* Reason for any delays */,
  "air_traffic_control_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air traffic control data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline (e.g., AA, UA) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "frequent_flyer_program" TEXT /* Name of the airline's frequent flyer program */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport (e.g., JFK, LAX) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "runway_length" INTEGER /* Length of the longest runway in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "weather_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the weather station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_performance" (
  "flight_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight performance record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "on_time_arrival" INTEGER /* Whether the flight arrived on time */,
  "cancelled" INTEGER /* Whether the flight was cancelled */,
  "delayed" INTEGER /* Whether the flight was delayed */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the flight was delayed */,
  "diverted" INTEGER /* Whether the flight was diverted */,
  "diverted_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport to which the flight was diverted */,
  "reason_for_cancellation" TEXT /* Reason for any cancellations */,
  "reason_for_diversion" TEXT /* Reason for any diversions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_diverted_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("diverted_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather data was recorded */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "flight_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight route */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight route in kilometers */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the flight in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions and access levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
